answer:
Higgsfield AI does not provide developer API access on its free tier [1]. API access is a gated feature reserved for higher-tier professional or studio-level plans [1][2].

While a free plan exists for manual, web-based experimentation [1][2], programmatic API access requires a paid subscription [1]. Documentation notes that API usage is intended for automated workflows and production pipelines, which are not supported under free account limitations [1][2]. If you require API integration, you must upgrade to a plan that explicitly lists API access as a feature [1][2]. Always verify the current tier benefits on the official Higgsfield pricing page before subscribing [3][4].
